item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 8min Brighton's first meeting of the year on Saturday evening has been cancelled after areas o
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 8min Brighton's first meeting of the year on Saturday evening has been cancelled after areas of damage to the racing surface were identified in a pre-declarations course walk this morning 2 1 655

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. BHA are up against it on affordability checks but they can make
item.description: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. BHA are up against it on affordability checks but they can make some quick wins by beefing up their Stewards Reports on the day (and vigorously following up anything missed there) & asking more Qs of some rides. Also, doing more on these private NH (details in pod) & Flat trials Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. Today's @AKBets podcast - Hedge Funds - should now be live on Youtube, Apple and Spotify . 3 1 2 5 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. This is the report we discussed on this morning's @AKBets podc
item.description:
Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. This is the report we discussed on this morning's @AKBets podcast on 43 minutes. Worth a listen. Has the welfare pendulum swung too far away from the human participants in horse racing? Cita Rob Harris @RobHarris · 12 abr. Special report
Deaths of jockeys away from the racecourses raises concerns about whether enough is being done on mental health in horse racing.
I’ve spoken to the mother of a teenage jockey found dead and a jockey who retired young this year
Watch here
https:// youtu.be/2ejYYUKLhqM 4 1 4 6 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 14 abr. RACING REVIEW section outside of Gold Dancer consisted of the fo
item.description: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 14 abr. RACING REVIEW section outside of Gold Dancer consisted of the following (and plenty more) from 15-27 minutes *ITV viewing figures *That 100k bet at 8-1 analysed *Riding to win is to be applauded, even if executed badly *Not giving a horse every chance to win is not - BHA Mostrar más 2 2 2 3 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 15 abr. Last week's discussion on barrier trials got a lot of interest/d
item.description:
Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 15 abr. Last week's discussion on barrier trials got a lot of interest/debate and we followed it up this week in an eight-minute section on 33-minutes in here, with a National Hunt angle included; https:// youtube.com/watch?v=zdWPOR ZjX7U … Cita Nick Bradley Racing @NBradleyRacing · 14 abr. Barrier Trial Winner – New 2YO Filly Added
We’re delighted to have added a smart Far Above filly to the Nick Bradley Racing string—and she looks a sharp, early-season type
Attached video of her barrier trial win – see for yourself.
Barrier trial winner 2 2 2 3 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. PODCAST TOPICS Intro: US Masters Chat (0-3mins) Gold Dancer (3-
item.description: Tony Calvin reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. PODCAST TOPICS Intro: US Masters Chat (0-3mins) Gold Dancer (3-15mins) Grand National Review (15-25mins) Other Racing News in the Last Week (25-27mins) The Green Party & The Sun (27-33mins) Barrier Trials Update: NH Racing Too (33-41mins) Change At The Tote (41-42mins) Mark Mostrar más Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 13 abr. Today's @AKBets podcast - Hedge Funds - should now be live on Youtube, Apple and Spotify . 4 1 1 5 mil
